held_signal.title: Interest rate hikes back in focus as inflation persists

candidate_match.title: Interest rate hikes back in focus as inflation persists
candidate_match.note: A near-identical headline from a LATER quarter's CPI print (different .aspx id) and/or the same publisher. The judge-match step MUST reject it as corroboration.

reject_axes: distinct_event: same evergreen headline template recurs every quarter with a fresh ABS CPI print — a later article is a different event, not corroboration of this one. A title-similarity matcher would wrongly match across quarters.
not_independent: a second Australian Broker article is the same publisher, not an independent corroborating source. Corroboration requires a different source.
why_it_matters: Gold-standard NEGATIVE case for the future corroboration agent's judge-match step. If the matcher can reject this, it discriminates events; if it matches on headline similarity, it manufactures fake corroboration. Also why the recurrence watch clusters on exact URL, never fuzzy title (see csc/tools/review_recurrence.py).
